data.generalSituation: Showers and thunderstorms associated with a broad trough of low pressure are affecting the coast of Guangdong and the northern part of the South China Sea.
data.forecastPeriod: Weather forecast for tonight and tomorrow
data.forecastDesc: Mainly cloudy with a few showers and thunderstorms. More showers in some areas at first tomorrow. Temperatures will range between 27 and 30 degrees. Moderate southwesterly winds.
data.outlook: There will still be occasional showers on Monday and Tuesday. Showers will ease off on Wednesday. Becoming very hot in the following couple of days.
